name: abilix-ai-marketing-studio
description: Abilix AI Marketing Studio - AI-powered marketing management platform (Hostinger Node.js ready)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=server && npm run typecheck --workspace=client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=server && npm run lint --workspace=client
